happy.advice: Great time for creative and challenging work.

sad.advice: Keep expectations small today and focus on progress.

angry.advice: Channel energy into focused work rather than reactions.

fear.advice: Avoid large goals right now. Focus on one next step.

surprise.advice: Use your heightened alertness to explore new opportunities.

neutral.advice: This is a good state for consistent productive work.

disgust.advice: Focus on constructive actions and avoid dwelling on negatives.
